videos.headline: TCU Horned Frogs vs. North Carolina Tar Heels: Full Highlights
videos.description: TCU Horned Frogs vs. North Carolina Tar Heels: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (TCU Horned Frogs vs. North Carolina Tar Heels: Full Highlights) 2025/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bill Belichick makes his first entrance as UNC's head coach
videos.description: Bill Belichick leads the North Carolina Tar Heels out of the tunnel for his first game as a collegiate head coach.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF One_Play (Bill Belichick makes his first entrance as UNC's head coach) 2025/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Caleb Hood runs in a TD on Belichick's first drive as UNC coach
videos.description: Caleb Hood gets downhill and scores a touchdown on North Carolina's opening drive.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Caleb Hood runs in a TD on Belichick's first drive as UNC coach) 2025/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Zachary Chapman drops QB for a sack
videos.description: Zachary Chapman brings down the QB for a sack

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Zachary Chapman drops QB for a sack) 2025/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: TCU's Josh Hoover connects with Jordan Dwyer on a 27-yard TD
videos.description: TCU's Josh Hoover goes deep to Jordan Dwyer to tie the score 7-7 in the first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (TCU's Josh Hoover connects with Jordan Dwyer on a 27-yard TD) 2025/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: TCU's Kyle Lemmermann drills a 32-yard FG
videos.description: Kyle Lemmermann gives TCU a 10-7 lead after a 32-yard field goal.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (TCU's Kyle Lemmermann drills a 32-yard FG) 2025/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: TCU's Bud Clark takes one back for a pick-6
videos.description: Bud Clark jumps in front of a pass and takes it back for a touchdown to extend TCU's lead over North Carolina.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (TCU's Bud Clark takes one back for a pick-6) 2025/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kaleb Cost comes up with an INT for UNC
videos.description: TCU's Josh Hoover throws a pass too high, and Kaleb Cost is able to come down with an interception.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF One-Play (Kaleb Cost comes up with an INT for UNC) 2025/09/02 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Kyle Lemmermann makes 33-yard field goal) 2025/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: TCU pours it on with another rushing TD
videos.description: Trent Battle goes untouched for a 28-yard touchdown, giving TCU a 33-7 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (TCU pours it on with another rushing TD) 2025/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Devean Deal scoops and scores for TCU
videos.description: Gio Lopez gets sacked and loses the ball, then Devean Deal picks it up and takes it back for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Devean Deal scoops and scores for TCU) 2025/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: UNC's Max Johnson throws a TD to brother Jake Johnson
videos.description: North Carolina's Max Johnson fires a 2-yard touchdown pass to Jake Johnson.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (UNC's Max Johnson throws a TD to brother Jake Johnson) 2025/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: DJ Rogers hauls in a TD for TCU
videos.description: Josh Hoover rolls out and hits DJ Rogers for a TCU touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (DJ Rogers hauls in a TD for TCU) 2025/09/02 ESHEET
